induction_input: The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote impressed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the musician composed spread.
The vase the artist painted sold.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences where a subject noun is followed by a relative clause (without a relative pronoun) and then an intransitive verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences where a subject noun is followed by a relative clause (without a relative pronoun) and then an intransitive verb.
l2_sentences: The dog my neighbor adopted barked all night.
The woman I admired most succeeded brilliantly.
The students the professor challenged thrived academically.
The athlete the coaches selected performed flawlessly.
The singer everyone adored disappeared suddenly.
